item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Vidya Wires Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: Vidya Wires Ltd, a micro-cap company in the Industrial Products sector, achieved a significant milestone on 23 April 2026 as its stock price surged to an all-time high of Rs 77.17, marking a remarkable day of performance and reflecting the company’s strong market momentum. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Fundviser Capital Reaches All-Time High
item.description: Fundviser Capital (India) Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has reached a new all-time high price of Rs 449.90 on 23 Apr 2026, underscoring a remarkable journey of growth and resilience in a challenging market environment. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Tata Communications Ltd Surges 5.06% to Day's High of Rs 1604 — Outperforms Sector by 3.95 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.78% on 23 Apr 2026, while Tata Communications Ltd surged 5.06%, reaching an intraday high of Rs 1604. This 3.95-percentage-point outperformance over the Telecom - Services sector highlights a stock-specific strength amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Man Infraconstruction Ltd Surges 7.64% to Day's High of Rs 110.42 — Outperforms Sector by 7.44 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.78% on 23 Apr 2026 while Man Infraconstruction Ltd surged 7.64%, outperforming its sector by 7.44 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: JTL Industries Ltd Surges 7.44% to Day's High of Rs 77.4 — Outperforms Sector by 6.76 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.78% on 23 Apr 2026 while JTL Industries Ltd surged 7.44%, marking a striking 6.76-percentage-point outperformance over its Iron & Steel Products sector. This strong intraday performance stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts DEE Development Engineers Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 431.85
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, DEE Development Engineers Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 431.85 on 23 Apr 2026, marking an impressive 81.6% gain over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum, with the stock outperforming its sector and maintaining a steady upward trajectory over the last four trading sessions. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Azad Engineering Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 2024.15
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 2024.15 on 23 Apr 2026, Azad Engineering Ltd has reached a new 52-week high, marking a 26.77% gain over the past year and outpacing the Sensex’s decline of 2.76%. This milestone reflects a strong alignment of technical indicators and sustained price momentum despite a broadly subdued market backdrop. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Hardwyn India Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 25.8
item.description: From a 52-week low of Rs 10.9 to a fresh high of Rs 25.8 on 23 Apr 2026, Hardwyn India Ltd has more than doubled in value over the past year, outpacing the Sensex which declined by 2.76% during the same period. This milestone reflects a powerful price momentum underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators across multiple timeframes. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Coastal Corporation Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 57.85
item.description: With a decisive break above Rs 57.85 on 23 Apr 2026, Coastal Corporation Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, extending its impressive 43.33% gain over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum, despite a broadly subdued market environment. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Rekvina Labs Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 44.85
item.description: With every major technical indicator aligned to the upside, Rekvina Labs Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 44.85 on 23 Apr 2026, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum after a steady two-day gain of 4.01%. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Lupin Ltd. to 52-Week High of Rs 2381.05
item.description: With a fresh 52-week high of Rs 2381.05 reached on 23 Jun 2026, Lupin Ltd. has demonstrated notable price momentum, outperforming its sector and maintaining a steady upward trajectory despite a broadly negative market backdrop. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Integrated Proteins Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 97.19
item.description: Surging to a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs 97.19 on 23 Apr 2026, Integrated Proteins Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, more than quadrupling from its 52-week low of Rs 20.71. This rally, sustained over 21 consecutive trading sessions with a 63.76% gain in that period, underscores a powerful technical alignment that has propelled the stock well ahead of its edible oil sector peers. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Manraj Housing Finance Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 31.4 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the second consecutive session, Manraj Housing Finance Ltd has seen its share price decline, hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 31.4 on 23 Apr 2026. This latest drop extends the stock’s downward trajectory, which has now resulted in a 7.86% loss over the past two days, underscoring persistent selling pressure despite broader market fluctuations. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Shantai Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 75.86
item.description: With a remarkable 421.30% gain over the past year, Shantai Industries Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 75.86 on 23 Apr 2026, showcasing an extraordinary rally that has outpaced the Sensex’s decline of 2.76% over the same period. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Covidh Technologies Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 74.16
item.description: With a remarkable 51.32% gain over the past 21 trading days, Covidh Technologies Ltd surged to a new 52-week high of Rs 74.16 on 23 Apr 2026, showcasing a powerful momentum that has captivated market attention despite a broadly subdued Sensex. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Integrated Proteins Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: Integrated Proteins Ltd, a micro-cap player in the edible oil industry, reached a significant milestone on 23 Apr 2026 by hitting an all-time high price of Rs.97.19. This achievement caps a remarkable rally that has seen the stock surge over 63% in the past 21 trading days, reflecting a sustained bullish trend amid a mixed sector performance. Time: 22 minutes ago

item.title: Piramal Pharma Ltd Surges 7.41% to Day's High of Rs 165.75 — Outperforms Sector by 5.39 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.63% on 23 Apr 2026, yet Piramal Pharma Ltd surged 7.41%, outperforming its Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector by 5.39 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: EFC (I) Ltd Surges 8.7% to Day's High of Rs 217.4 — Outperforms Realty Sector by 9.8 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 0.63% on 23 Apr 2026, while EFC (I) Ltd surged 8.7%, outperforming its Realty sector peers by nearly 10 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Dollar Industries Ltd Surges 7.32% to Day's High of Rs 301 — Outperforms Sector by 7.68 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.63% on 23 Apr 2026, while Dollar Industries Ltd surged 7.32%, reaching an intraday high of Rs 301. This 7.68-percentage-point outperformance over its Garments & Apparels sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide uplift. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Marksans Pharma Ltd Surges 7.04% to Day's High of Rs 193.55 — Outperforms Sector by 4.76 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.63% on 23 Apr 2026 while Marksans Pharma Ltd surged 7.04%, marking a 4.76-percentage-point outperformance over its Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector. This strong single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid broader market weakness, signalling a noteworthy shift in momentum. Time: 24 minutes ago
